matched_lines: - Critical fire weather conditions continue through tomorrow,
- Red Flag Warnings are in effect for much of eastern Utah and
critical fire weather conditions each day through tomorrow. See
into Saturday, and will put the critical fire weather conditions to
to this, previous Fire Weather Watches for Friday have been upgraded
